variants: Louka Nowak is a prominent expert in the field of Epidemiology, recognized widely for her innovative contributions. She received the esteemed Skygate Distinction for her exceptional work in public health. In addition to her research, Louka authored the Greenwood Sequence Board, which has become a valuable tool for epidemiologists. She is also an active member of the Maplethread Spinners Council, where she shares her passion for community engagement in health awareness. Her doctoral advisor, the respected Murat Akbulut, played a significant role in her academic development.
